linux-aarch64.reason: No PyPI wheel for Linux ARM64; compile on the native runner

windows-x64.reason: No PyPI wheel for Windows. The MSVC optimizer hangs compiling kalign's DP kernels, so build with clang-cl (MSVC-ABI compatible => the pybind11 wheel still links against CPython, but clang handles kalign's GCC-oriented C and doesn't stall). clang-cl requires the Ninja generator: with scikit-build-core's default Visual Studio generator, setting CMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang-cl hangs cmake configure (VS selects the compiler via -T toolset, not CMAKE_C_COMPILER). SIMD blocks are disabled to keep the wheel portable and to skip kalign's run-time check_c_source_runs probes (a crashing probe would pop a WerFault dialog and hang the build). Threadpool/OpenMP off => serial.
